question_subset: Per state, show top 3 ticket types by revenue.
Show postal code, city, and state for the top 20 revenues.
Which reporting offices deliver the most revenue in NRW?
Which tariff associations are especially strong in which states?
Show average price per ticket type (from sales) and compare to ticket_produkte.
Compare actual revenue (ticket_verkaeufe) with planned revenue (plan_umsatz) per month.
Show per tariff association the deviation (actual - plan) for 2025.
Show monthly deviation as a percentage.

per_question.question: Per state, show top 3 ticket types by revenue.
per_question.generated_sql:
SELECT
    tv.jahr,
    rb.bundesland_name,
    SUM(tv.umsatz_eur) AS umsatz_eur
FROM ticket_verkaeufe tv
JOIN postleitzahlen p
    ON CAST(tv.plz AS VARCHAR) = p.plz
JOIN regionen_bundesland rb
    ON p.bundesland_code2 = rb.bundesland_code2

GROUP BY tv.jahr, rb.bundesland_name
ORDER BY tv.jahr, umsatz_eur DESC
per_question.gold_sql: WITH revenue_by_state AS (SELECT r.bundesland_name, tp.ticket_name, SUM(tv.umsatz_eur) AS revenue_eur FROM ticket_verkaeufe tv JOIN ticket_produkte tp ON tv.ticket_code = tp.ticket_code JOIN postleitzahlen p ON CAST(tv.plz AS VARCHAR) = p.plz JOIN regionen_bundesland r ON p.bundesland_code2 = r.bundesland_code2 GROUP BY r.bundesland_name, tp.ticket_name), ranked AS (SELECT *, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY bundesland_name ORDER BY revenue_eur DESC) AS rn FROM revenue_by_state) SELECT bundesland_name, ticket_name, revenue_eur FROM ranked WHERE rn <= 3 ORDER BY bundesland_name, revenue_eur DESC;

per_question.question: Show postal code, city, and state for the top 20 revenues.
per_question.generated_sql:
SELECT
    tv.jahr,
    rb.bundesland_name,
    SUM(tv.umsatz_eur) AS umsatz_eur
FROM ticket_verkaeufe tv
JOIN postleitzahlen p
    ON CAST(tv.plz AS VARCHAR) = p.plz
JOIN regionen_bundesland rb
    ON p.bundesland_code2 = rb.bundesland_code2

GROUP BY tv.jahr, rb.bundesland_name
ORDER BY tv.jahr, umsatz_eur DESC
per_question.gold_sql: SELECT p.plz, p.ort, r.bundesland_name, SUM(tv.umsatz_eur) AS revenue_eur FROM ticket_verkaeufe tv JOIN postleitzahlen p ON CAST(tv.plz AS VARCHAR) = p.plz JOIN regionen_bundesland r ON p.bundesland_code2 = r.bundesland_code2 GROUP BY p.plz, p.ort, r.bundesland_name ORDER BY revenue_eur DESC LIMIT 20;

per_question.question: Which reporting offices deliver the most revenue in NRW?
per_question.generated_sql: SELECT m.meldestelle_name, SUM(tv.umsatz_eur) AS revenue_eur FROM ticket_verkaeufe tv JOIN meldestellen m ON tv.meldestelle_code = m.meldestelle_code JOIN postleitzahlen p ON CAST(tv.plz AS VARCHAR) = p.plz JOIN regionen_bundesland r ON p.bundesland_code2 = r.bundesland_code2 WHERE r.bundesland_name = 'Nordrhein-Westfalen' GROUP BY m.meldestelle_name ORDER BY revenue_eur DESC;
per_question.gold_sql: SELECT m.meldestelle_name, SUM(tv.umsatz_eur) AS revenue_eur FROM ticket_verkaeufe tv JOIN meldestellen m ON tv.meldestelle_code = m.meldestelle_code JOIN postleitzahlen p ON CAST(tv.plz AS VARCHAR) = p.plz JOIN regionen_bundesland r ON p.bundesland_code2 = r.bundesland_code2 WHERE r.bundesland_name = 'Nordrhein-Westfalen' GROUP BY m.meldestelle_name ORDER BY revenue_eur DESC;

per_question.question: Which tariff associations are especially strong in which states?
per_question.generated_sql: WITH revenue_by_state AS (SELECT t.name AS tarifverbund, r.bundesland_name, SUM(tv.umsatz_eur) AS revenue_eur FROM ticket_verkaeufe tv JOIN tarifverbuende t ON tv.tarifverbund_id = t.tarifverbund_id JOIN postleitzahlen p ON CAST(tv.plz AS VARCHAR) = p.plz JOIN regionen_bundesland r ON p.bundesland_code2 = r.bundesland_code2 GROUP BY t.name, r.bundesland_name), ranked AS (SELECT *, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY tarifverbund ORDER BY revenue_eur DESC) AS rn FROM revenue_by_state) SELECT tarifverbund, bundesland_name, revenue_eur FROM ranked WHERE rn <= 3 ORDER BY tarifverbund, revenue_eur DESC;
per_question.gold_sql: WITH revenue_by_state AS (SELECT t.name AS tarifverbund, r.bundesland_name, SUM(tv.umsatz_eur) AS revenue_eur FROM ticket_verkaeufe tv JOIN tarifverbuende t ON tv.tarifverbund_id = t.tarifverbund_id JOIN postleitzahlen p ON CAST(tv.plz AS VARCHAR) = p.plz JOIN regionen_bundesland r ON p.bundesland_code2 = r.bundesland_code2 GROUP BY t.name, r.bundesland_name), ranked AS (SELECT *, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY tarifverbund ORDER BY revenue_eur DESC) AS rn FROM revenue_by_state) SELECT tarifverbund, bundesland_name, revenue_eur FROM ranked WHERE rn <= 3 ORDER BY tarifverbund, revenue_eur DESC;

per_question.question: Show average price per ticket type (from sales) and compare to ticket_produkte.
per_question.generated_sql:
SELECT
    tv.jahr,
    tp.ticket_name,
    SUM(tv.umsatz_eur) AS umsatz_eur
FROM ticket_verkaeufe tv
JOIN ticket_produkte tp
    ON tv.ticket_code = tp.ticket_code

GROUP BY tv.jahr, tp.ticket_name
ORDER BY tv.jahr, umsatz_eur DESC
per_question.gold_sql: SELECT tp.ticket_name, SUM(tv.umsatz_eur) / NULLIF(SUM(tv.anzahl), 0) AS avg_sale_price_eur, tp.preis_eur AS catalog_price_eur FROM ticket_verkaeufe tv JOIN ticket_produkte tp ON tv.ticket_code = tp.ticket_code GROUP BY tp.ticket_name, tp.preis_eur ORDER BY tp.ticket_name;

per_question.question: Compare actual revenue (ticket_verkaeufe) with planned revenue (plan_umsatz) per month.
per_question.generated_sql:
SELECT
    tv.jahr,
    tv.monat,
    SUM(tv.umsatz_eur) AS umsatz_eur
FROM ticket_verkaeufe tv

GROUP BY tv.jahr, tv.monat
ORDER BY tv.jahr, tv.monat
per_question.gold_sql: WITH actual AS (SELECT jahr, monat, SUM(umsatz_eur) AS actual_revenue FROM ticket_verkaeufe GROUP BY jahr, monat), plan AS (SELECT jahr, monat, SUM(umsatz_eur) AS planned_revenue FROM plan_umsatz GROUP BY jahr, monat) SELECT COALESCE(a.jahr, p.jahr) AS jahr, COALESCE(a.monat, p.monat) AS monat, a.actual_revenue, p.planned_revenue FROM actual a FULL OUTER JOIN plan p ON a.jahr = p.jahr AND a.monat = p.monat ORDER BY jahr, monat;

per_question.question: Show per tariff association the deviation (actual - plan) for 2025.
per_question.gold_sql: WITH actual AS (SELECT tarifverbund_id, SUM(umsatz_eur) AS actual_revenue FROM ticket_verkaeufe WHERE jahr = 2025 GROUP BY tarifverbund_id), plan AS (SELECT tarifverbund_id, SUM(umsatz_eur) AS planned_revenue FROM plan_umsatz WHERE jahr = 2025 GROUP BY tarifverbund_id) SELECT t.name AS tarifverbund, actual.actual_revenue, plan.planned_revenue, actual.actual_revenue - plan.planned_revenue AS deviation_eur FROM actual JOIN plan ON actual.tarifverbund_id = plan.tarifverbund_id JOIN tarifverbuende t ON actual.tarifverbund_id = t.tarifverbund_id ORDER BY deviation_eur DESC;

per_question.question: Show monthly deviation as a percentage.
per_question.gold_sql: WITH actual AS (SELECT jahr, monat, SUM(umsatz_eur) AS actual_revenue FROM ticket_verkaeufe GROUP BY jahr, monat), plan AS (SELECT jahr, monat, SUM(umsatz_eur) AS planned_revenue FROM plan_umsatz GROUP BY jahr, monat) SELECT a.jahr, a.monat, (a.actual_revenue - p.planned_revenue) / NULLIF(p.planned_revenue, 0) * 100 AS deviation_pct FROM actual a JOIN plan p ON a.jahr = p.jahr AND a.monat = p.monat ORDER BY a.jahr, a.monat;
